mapper.insert: INSERT INTO company_info ( id, company_name, ceo_name, phone, founded_date, zip_code, address, address_detail, business_reg_no, corporate_reg_no, logo_path, seal_path ) VALUES ( 1, #{companyName}, #{ceoName}, #{phone}, #{foundedDate}, #{zipCode}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{businessRegNo}, #{corporateRegNo}, #{logoPath}, #{sealPath} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE company_name = VALUES(company_name), ceo_name = VALUES(ceo_name), phone = VALUES(phone), founded_date = VALUES(founded_date), zip_code = VALUES(zip_code), address = VALUES(address), address_detail = VALUES(address_detail), business_reg_no = VALUES(business_reg_no), corporate_reg_no = VALUES(corporate_reg_no), logo_path = VALUES(logo_path), seal_path = VALUES(seal_path)
